title: T-033 — Override Assignment Modal (override_assignment_modal)
prompt:
# T-033 — Override Assignment Modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 override, §15.4 V-SCHED-02/03/04/08
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:98-212 (`override_assignment_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:455-470
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement wide Dialog where Planner overrides assignment (new line_id, new_planned_start_time, new_shift_id, reason_code, reason_notes) with allergen-conflict alert + impact preview.

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/scheduler/OverrideAssignmentModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog max-w-3xl).
2. Form fields: new_line_id Select (eligible lines from fa_line_compatibility), new_planned_start_time Input datetime-local, new_shift_id Select, reason_code Select (loaded from override_reason_codes ref table), reason_notes Textarea.
3. Cross-field zod superRefine: V-SCHED-02 allergen compat warning rendered as Alert; V-SCHED-04 overlap → field error; reason_code required (V-SCHED-08).
4. Calls /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/override (T-015); on 422 displays structured error toast.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/OverrideAssignmentModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/get-changeover-impact.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/OverrideAssignmentModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given allergen-incompatible new_line_id, when form is filled, then Alert variant 'destructive' appears showing 'Allergen conflict' and submit is blocked
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:98-212, then it has the same wide layout, same field set in same order (line, datetime, shift, reason_code, notes), same impact preview card, and uses the same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Select, Input, Textarea, Alert, Button) — parity verified by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given a 422 V-SCHED-04 overlap response, when submit fires, then toast shows 'Time slot overlap on LINE-X' and form remains open

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/OverrideAssignmentModal.test.tsx covering allergen alert + parity + 422 toast
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/OverrideAssignmentModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass V-SCHED-02 allergen check on client-side warning (also enforced server-side per T-015)
- Do not allow submit with empty reason_code
- Do not call solver client-side for impact preview (use server action)

pipeline_inputs.description: Wide Dialog with allergen-conflict alert, impact preview, V-SCHED cross-field validation, calls override API.
pipeline_inputs.details: react-hook-form + zodResolver superRefine for V-SCHED-02. Impact preview computed via server helper getChangeoverImpact. reason_code from override_reason_codes ref table. Translation notes: hardcoded options → ref table; setTimeout → real Server Action; emit outbox via API.
out_of_scope: Do not call solver microservice from client
